titleStmt.title: SII 37.507: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 507. (A.R. No. B 7 of 1943-44.) Nandavaram, Banganapalle Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab fixed (another) on the floor in the Chauḍēśvari temple.
This is dated Śaka 1214 Dundubhi, Śravaṇa śu. 15. However the characters of the inscription are about the 16th century.

It states that the 360 Ekāngavīras, the devotees of the goddess Chauḍēśvari invoking her aid, went to help mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Virūparāya-ayadēva Mahārāju, the ruler of Pānugallu, in order to relieve the siege laid to his fort. After being victorious, they were conferred general titles by the chief in appreciation of their valour and success. It records an endownment made by them (the Ekāngavīras) at one ruka per head to the goddess, for making ornaments, daily and occasional offerings to the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1214 Agunēṭi duṁdubhi saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 15 lu
muṁnūru Aruvayi yēkāṁggi vīrulu callikēri tiṁmmamaku vrāyiṁcci Iccina dharmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu śrīmaṁ
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvaraṁ virūparāya Ayadēva mahārāyalugāru pānugaṁṭi sthalamaṁdu siṁhāsanārūḍhulai
rājyapratipālanaṁ cēstūvuṁḍagā naṁdahāraṁgguru rājulu mātsaryamu cātanu sakalasainyasamētulai vō
ccipānugallu muṭṭaḍicēsi vaśapōka Appuḍu maṁmu pilapiṁcci mīru
cemuḍēśvaramma varamu kumāḷlu varaprasādhakulu Ani sabahumānamu śēsinapuḍu
garavutchahālu modalayina bhūṣaṇālu Icci yī muṭṭaḍi viḍipiṁcci I
rājulatō sakalasainyamutō hataṁśēsi maṁmu vuddhariṁccumani Anēka prayōcita
mugā māku delpukone ganaka mēmu mā daivamaina camuḍēśvaramma cāta Abhaya
hastamu tīsuka mēmu muṁdara Āyaṁma vāru pēruṁḍḍi Ī tīrugā vocci
sakala saiṁnya samētulaina Ī rājula hataṁ sēyuṁḍḍa Ani śelavu Icce ganaka A
ṁmavāri kaṭākṣaṁccāta rājula hatamu cēśi yerupurē virūparāyalayyavāru gelistiṁ
mi ganaka Ārāyalayya meccigaṁḍaragaṁḍa vuttamagaṁḍḍa gaṁḍḍabhēruṁḍḍa Anē
birudulu māku Icci Aṁppiṁcci Appuḍu Ā pānugaṁṭi siṁhāsanamu nilpi
nīvu māku viṁduśēstivi . malikhājuniniki [Anukūlavativi] cauḍaṁmavara
kula komā¨rtevu nīvu yēmi Aḍugutunāvu
Ani Aṁṭē Aṁmavāri bhūṣaṇālaku Aṁggaraṁgga vaibhavālaku śāvalaku
kulu 1ka rūkalekhkha tōgaṭakulaṁ mīda va¨rtana cēyumaṁṭṭē
yī Agiśālavāramu Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . tōgaṭakulaṁ vāri
ru Iṁdduku tappinā kāhsilō braṁhma hatya śrī ha
tya śiśuhatyaśēsina pāpāna bōduru .
yiṁdduku ceṁdrasūryulu
gagana vāṇini sākṣi .
Digital edition of SII 37.507 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
